title: "Lot Sat In The Gate Of Sodom" Genesis 19:1

notes.introduction: An exposition of Genesis 19:1 on the progressive spiritual decline of Lot, tracing his movement from pitching his tent toward Sodom (Genesis 13) to dwelling in Sodom (Genesis 14) to sitting in the gate of Sodom, with supporting passages from Hebrews 3, 1 Corinthians 15, and 2 Chronicles 28 on the deceitfulness of sin and desensitization to wickedness.
themes: godly living in a wicked culture

sections.heading: Two New Testament Principles on Sin
King Ahaz and the Downward Spiral
Psalm 1 and Living Right in a Wrong World
Desensitization in the Home and Culture
